name: document-driven-development
description: Build a validated Fast MVP or start Direct Strict, then enforce approved documents, immutable adoption baselines, and task or package locks.

interface.shortDescription: Validate a Fast MVP or start Strict, then enforce approved plans.
interface.longDescription: Builds an evidence-backed vertical Fast MVP and graduates it through an immutable Git baseline, or starts directly from an approved project-specific document graph. Both routes converge on document hashes, task locks, package ownership, independent review, traceability, hooks, and CI.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me choose Fast MVP or Direct Strict from my PRD, then preserve the full Strict gates after adoption.
